"D:\Software\CLion 2023.3.3\bin\cmake\win\x64\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\cpp1.dir/objects.a
D:\Software\CLION2~1.3\bin\mingw\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\cpp1.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\cpp1.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Software\CLION2~1.3\bin\mingw\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--undefined=WinMain -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\cpp1.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o cpp1.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libcpp1.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\cpp1.dir\linkLibs.rsp
